subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath remembered Me, attained unto My presence, hearkened unto My call, and stood before My countenance by My leave. Verily, he heareth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا من ذکرنی و فاز بلقائی و سمع ندائی و حضر امام وجهی باذنی انه سمی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
